codex_audit_request.role: Independent read-only bridge proof and implementation auditor
codex_audit_request.scope: Sprint 2 closure remediation waves A-I against council findings
codex_audit_request.changed_files: M knowledge_base/bridges/midnight-cardano-recursive-bridge.md M openspec/changes/sprint-02-reference-harness-poc/specs/reference-harness/spec.md M reference/README.md A reference/evidence/bootstrap/clean-checkout-qualification-v1.json M reference/evidence/conformance-report-v1.json A reference/evidence/current-generation.json A reference/evidence/generations/b6c5bdd6abbd4471b900b7eb1189dae7/conformance-report-v1.json A reference/evidence/generations/b6c5bdd6abbd4471b900b7eb1189dae7/generation-manifest.json A reference/evidence/generations/b6c5bdd6abbd4471b900b7eb1189dae7/structural-report-v1.json A reference/evidence/host-probes/host-capability-2026-07-10.json M reference/go/internal/bsb22/parser.go M reference/go/internal/bsb22/parser_test.go A reference/observers/requirements.hashes.txt M scripts/compare-reference-harness.ps1 M scripts/setup-reference-harness.ps1 A scripts/tests/openspec-telemetry.contract.ps1 M scripts/tests/setup-reference-harness.contract.ps1 M scripts/tests/verify-reference-harness.integration.ps1 M scripts/verify-reference-harness.ps1
codex_audit_request.acceptance_criteria: OPENSPEC_TELEMETRY=0 and DO_NOT_TRACK=1 before OpenSpec; CBOR schema field/type bound; BSB22 named-sentinel swaps return bsb22-field-mismatch; structural payload + conformance envelope contract; structured command provenance; Python require-hashes lock; crash-safe generation publication; control tests without recursive verifier; host probe reconciled; deployment remains blocked and activation_eligible=false; cryptographic_verification=false; all S01-BLOCK and CONS gates open.
codex_audit_request.known_non_claims: No Cardano validator accepted wrapped Midnight relation. No Midnight operation accepted external Cardano proof. Go BSB22 is parser-only. Observations are unsigned. Six S01-BLOCK and eight CONS gates remain open. Docker/WSL are not deployment readiness.
codex_audit_request.verification: pwsh scripts/verify-reference-harness.ps1 exit 0; -UpdateEvidence exit 0; default byte-identical; go test bsb22 PASS; setup -WhatIf PLANNED; control tests PASS.
codex_audit_request.questions: 1. Do any claims inflate structural-pass into cryptographic or deployment success? 2. Is generation-pointer publication crash-safe enough for the documented contract? 3. Are command records actually produced by the invocation wrapper? 4. Any Blocking or Major gaps remaining from the prior council findings?
codex_audit_request.response_contract: Findings first, ordered Blocking, Major, Minor. Each finding must include stable id, file and line, violated requirement, technical consequence, reproduction method, and minimum acceptable disposition. End with exact B/M/m counts, residual test gaps, and verdict pass or changes-required. Do not edit files.
